title: Axe - Optimized
description: The Best Ressource Pack for Axe.
body:
# AxeOptimized - Optimized

_**This resource pack was created with the goal of providing the best Axe experience.**_

**This Pack modifies the following items/particules:**

> **A New Shield/Armor break sound.**

> **New Glint & Armor/Weapons**

> **Charge Indicator** _(Release)_

> **Crit/Sweep Particle** _(Release)_

> **Side Shield** _(Release)_

> **Preview Video** _(Soon)_

### Charged Texture (Crossbow)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63ffea6ef868ffbe497d5ef0a5ec5da1754c887b.png)

**_This pack is not only made for survival between friends, it is also made to play in multiplayer on servers pratice like._**

> **SwiftPvP** _(eu.swiftpvp.xyz)_

> **Minemen** _(Modern Practice)_

> **CatPvP**

> **MetalMC**

> **PvPClub**

**_This Resource Pack is compatible with all other resource packs, you just need to put it in the first line of resource packs for it to work._**

**_Using this pack, yKoseli got Low Tier 3 on Axe. (Is Real)_**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fb9007c55a14eb4414c29c644116ac6805dafbd.png)

# AxeOptimized By yKoseli
